hook.summary: POV poker hand reveal featuring iconic animated characters.
hook.visual_action: A yellow hand places two aces onto a poker table surrounded by characters resembling The Simpsons.
hook.voiceover_transcript: Aces. Let's see what you've got.

scene_flow: POV perspective of a poker game with iconic animated characters.
Dealer reveals cards on a green felt table in a casino setting.
A character celebrates a winning hand of two aces.
Logo reveal on a grand stage with app store links.
cta_text: Available on the App Store / GET IT ON Google Play
audience_proxy: Adult fans of The Simpsons who enjoy casual casino and poker games.
